panels.title: Stage Counts (24h)
panels.description: Aggregate count at each pipeline stage.

panels.title: Symbol Pipeline Status (24h)
panels.description: Per-symbol view of where each symbol is in the pipeline. Shows attempted, generated, skipped reasons, and trades.

panels.title: Entry Filter Blocks by Symbol
panels.description: Which symbols are blocked by entry filter and why. CHOP regime = all symbols blocked.

panels.title: Signal Gen Skips by Symbol
panels.description: Symbols that passed entry filter but skipped at signal generation (low confidence, lead-lag kill, multi-TF penalty).

panels.title: AI Decisions by Symbol
panels.description: Recent AI analyst decisions per symbol with confidence, direction, and latency.

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol AS "Symbol", COUNT(*) AS "Calls", AVG((output_json->>'ai_confidence')::numeric) AS "Avg AI Conf", SUM(CASE WHEN decision_type = 'validated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Validated", SUM(CASE WHEN decision_type = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Rejected", AVG(latency_ms) AS "Avg Latency (ms)", MAX(TO_CHAR(created_at, 'HH24:MI:SS')) AS "Last Call" FROM ai_decisions WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

panels.title: Risk Gate & Trades by Symbol
panels.description: Risk gate pass/fail and trades opened per symbol.

panels.title: Signal Confidence Distribution
panels.description: Per-symbol average signal confidence with count. Sort by confidence to find strongest/weakest signals.

panels.title: Signal Confidence Over Time (per symbol)
panels.description: Signal confidence trend per symbol. Identifies which symbols are producing stronger/weaker signals over time.

panels.title: Recent Trades by Symbol
panels.description: Trade history from Postgres. Shows which symbols actually made it through the full pipeline to execution.

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol AS "Symbol", side AS "Side", entry_price AS "Entry Price", exit_price AS "Exit Price", quantity AS "Qty", realized_pnl AS "Realized PnL", roi_pct AS "ROI %", exit_reason AS "Exit Reason", TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Opened", TO_CHAR(closed_at, 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Closed" FROM trades ORDER BY COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) DESC LIMIT 30;
